raw_consumer_statement:
{$27.00} - XX/XX/year> I filed a dispute with Citicard to address a charge from a merchant that sold me damaged goods. I provided pictures and stated the details as to why I am not responsible for this charge. Citi reached out to the merchant and the merchant in return provided false information about the transaction in question and as a result Citi ruled in their favor, which I felt was unfair. 

I recently reopened the dispute, provided clear and accurate details as to why I should not be responsible for the charge as it was clear the merchant scammed me by concealing the fact that the goods were damaged when sold to me. Citi still reversed the charge and made me responsible, and I am frustrated because I am the one who was wronged and Citi, as my longtime financial institution, did not work to back me at all and instead backed the merchant. I want this charge removed from my transactions as I do not hold accountability for this charge when the merchant did not provide the expected goods. 

Citi- its a shame you state youre on the side of the account holder when clearly youre not. Also the customer service is beyond horrible now that they outsourced to XXXX ; representatives are rude and do not care to provide good services. After all this I am considering closing my Citi account for good and moving onto better financial service providers who actually back their customers.
